data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Conversion attribution from wishlist to checkout', but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding wishlist functionality or its linkage to the checkout process. The linked use case describes a scenario involving a wishlist, but there is no evidence of actual conversion attribution being tracked or validated in the prior steps. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of conversion attribution from wishlist to checkout.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
